channel.title: Business - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

1. American Airlines suspends 6 routes because of high jet fuel costs  CBS News
  2. Major U.S. airline cuts popular routes out of LAX over spiking fuel prices  KTLA
  3. American Airlines suspends several routes. See impacted flights  USA Today
  4. American Airlines temporarily suspends some of its summer routes due to steep jet fuel costs  ABC News - Breaking News, Latest News and Videos
  5. American Airlines cuts 2 Phoenix Sky Harbor routes. What it means  azcentral.com and The Arizona Republic

item.title: $8.5 Billion: Berkshire’s Greg Abel Just Made His First Big Bet, and It’s Wildly Contrarian - 24/7 Wall St.
item.description:
1. $8.5 Billion: Berkshire’s Greg Abel Just Made His First Big Bet, and It’s Wildly Contrarian  24/7 Wall St.
  2. Berkshire Hathaway and Japanese Builders See the Same Opportunity in U.S. Housing  WSJ
  3. Warren Buffett praises Greg Abel's $16.8 billion spending spree — including a $10 billion bet on Google  Yahoo Finance
  4. Berkshire, under new CEO Greg Abel, invests $16.8 billion in two days  Reuters
  5. Berkshire Hathaway buys Taylor Morrison for $6.8 billion. Buffett touts Abel’s deal-making  CNBC

item.title: Alphabet’s record-breaking $85B raise for Google’s AI business is a helluva good signal - TechCrunch
item.description:
1. Alphabet’s record-breaking $85B raise for Google’s AI business is a helluva good signal  TechCrunch

item.title: McDonald’s Employee Allegedly Told a Customer to “Give Us More Time” at 5:01 AM — He Left and Posted About It - Yahoo

item.title: Oil industry warns Trump administration of price spikes within weeks - Politico
item.description:
1. Oil industry warns Trump administration of price spikes within weeks  Politico

item.title: Apple is Permanently Closing Three U.S. Stores This Month - MacRumors
item.description:
